bassshakertelemetry.config.title: Bass Shaker Telemetry
bassshakertelemetry.config.mounted_enabl: Nzọụkwụ mgbe ị nọ n'elu ihe
bassshakertelemetry.config.game_sound_de: Họrọ ngwa Windows Minecraft ji egwu ọdịyo egwuregwu nkịtị.
bassshakertelemetry.config.output_device: Họrọ ngwa Windows mod ji epụta haptics.
bassshakertelemetry.config.master_volume: Ike ukwu maka mmetụta haptics niile.
bassshakertelemetry.config.page_movement: Mepee ntọala haptics mmegharị na ala.
bassshakertelemetry.config.page_misc.too: Mepee ntọala ndị ọzọ na ngwaọrụ.
bassshakertelemetry.config.damage_incomi: Mee ka haptics rụọ ọrụ mgbe ị natara mmebi.
Mee ka haptics rụọ ọrụ mgbe ị kụrụ ihe site na ọgụ melee.
bassshakertelemetry.config.combat_hit_co: Mee ka nzaghachi nkụ server kwadoro rụọ ọrụ; o nwere ike ịdị ntakịrị nwayọ karịa nkụ mpaghara.
bassshakertelemetry.config.movement_enab: Mee ka texture mmegharị na-aga n'ihu rụọ ọrụ dabere na ọsọ na osooso.
bassshakertelemetry.config.movement_flig: Ike texture mmegharị mgbe ị na-efe.
Ike texture ikuku nwere ntụziaka mgbe ị na-agagharị n'ikuku.
bassshakertelemetry.config.movement_swim: Ike texture mmegharị mgbe ị na-egwu mmiri.
bassshakertelemetry.config.movement_wate: Ike texture mmiri nwere ntụziaka mgbe ị na-agagharị n'ime mmiri.
bassshakertelemetry.config.footsteps_ena: Mee ka haptics nzọụkwụ rụọ ọrụ mgbe ị na-eje ije ma ọ bụ na-agba ọsọ.
bassshakertelemetry.config.mounted_enabl: Mee ka nzọụkwụ na mmetụta rụọ ọrụ mgbe ị na-anọ n'elu mounts.
Ike mmetụta nzọụkwụ mgbe ị nọ n'elu mounts.
bassshakertelemetry.config.sound_haptics: Mee ka haptics ọdịyo egwuregwu na-akwọ rụọ ọrụ, dịka mmetụta na mgbawa.
bassshakertelemetry.config.sound_gain.to: Ike zuru oke nke haptics ụda na-akwọ.
bassshakertelemetry.config.gameplay_hapt: Mee ka haptics gameplay emepụtara rụọ ọrụ, dịka ngwupụta na pulses mmegharị.
bassshakertelemetry.config.gameplay_gain: Ike zuru oke nke haptics gameplay.
bassshakertelemetry.config.biome_enabled: Mee ka mgbaàmà dị mkpirikpi rụọ ọrụ mgbe ị batara biome ọhụrụ.
bassshakertelemetry.config.accessibility: Gosi HUD n'elu ihuenyo na-akọwa haptics na-arụ ọrụ.
bassshakertelemetry.config.demo_run.tool: Malite usoro demo iji hụ ọtụtụ mmetụta.
bassshakertelemetry.config.test.tooltip: Kpọọ nnwale dị mkpirikpi maka mmetụta a.
bassshakertelemetry.config.damage_ms.too: Ogologo oge mgbawa mmebi n'ime millisekọnd.
bassshakertelemetry.config.accel_ms.tool: Ogologo oge mgbawa osooso n'ime millisekọnd.
bassshakertelemetry.config.sound_cooldow: Oge kacha nta n'etiti mgbawa haptics ụda.
bassshakertelemetry.config.gameplay_cool: Oge kacha nta n'etiti mgbawa haptics gameplay.
bassshakertelemetry.config.mining_period: Oge n'ime millisekọnd n'etiti mweghachi pulse ngwupụta.
bassshakertelemetry.config.output_buffer: Nha buffer ọdịyo maka mmepụta haptics. Buffer ndị nta na-ebelata latency ma ha nwere ike ime ka mkpọtụ pụta na sistemụ ụfọdụ.
bassshakertelemetry.config.output_eq_off: Mee ka filter EQ mmepụta rụọ ọrụ.
bassshakertelemetry.config.output_eq_gai: Ọnụego ịkwalite ma ọ bụ ibelata maka filter EQ mmepụta.
bassshakertelemetry.config.smart_volume_: Mee ka Smart Volume rụọ ọrụ maka leveling akpaaka.
Ọkwa mmepụta ebumnuche Smart Volume ji.
bassshakertelemetry.config.cal_tone_30hz: Kpọọ tone 30 Hz kwụsie ike maka nhazi.
bassshakertelemetry.config.cal_tone_60hz: Kpọọ tone 60 Hz kwụsie ike maka nhazi.
bassshakertelemetry.config.cal_sweep_20_: Kpọọ sweep iji chọta resonance na ebe adịghị ike.
bassshakertelemetry.config.cal_stop.tool: Kwụsị nnwale kalibreshọn ọ bụla na-agba ọsọ.

bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.overrides: Mmekọrịta igodo kpọmkwem (na-enweghị mmetụta nke mkpụrụedemede ukwu)
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.enabled.t: Mee ka mode routing Sound Scape rụọ ọrụ ma ọ bụ gbanyụọ ya.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.groups.to: Dezie otu ọwa akpọrọ aha e nwere ike iji dị ka ebumnuche routing.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.overrides: Dezie overrides routing kwa mmemme dabere na igodo debug.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.group_del: Hichapụ otu a; a pụghị ihichapụ otu ndabara 'All'.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.group_nam: Aha otu a, eji ya dịka ebumnuche routing grp:<name>.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.group_cha: Gbanwee ma etinyere ọwa a n'otu ahụ.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.override_: Igodo debug a ga-eji mee mmekọrịta kpọmkwem na-enweghị mmetụta nke mkpụrụedemede ukwu.
Họrọ ọwa ebumnuche ma ọ bụ otu maka mmemme kwekọrọ.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.roa: Họrọ ebumnuche routing maka mmemme texture mmegharị.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.dam: Họrọ ebumnuche routing maka mmemme mmebi.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.bio: Họrọ ebumnuche routing maka mmemme mgbaàmà biome.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.acc: Họrọ ebumnuche routing maka mmemme mgbawa osooso.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.sou: Họrọ ebumnuche routing maka mmemme haptics ụda na-akwọ.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.gam: Họrọ ebumnuche routing maka mmemme gameplay.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.foo: Họrọ ebumnuche routing maka mmemme nzọụkwụ.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.mou: Họrọ ebumnuche routing maka mmemme n'elu mounts na ofufe.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.min: Họrọ ebumnuche routing maka mmemme ịma jijiji ngwupụta.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.cus: Họrọ ebumnuche routing maka mmemme omenala ma ọ bụ ndị ọzọ.

bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.re: Bugharia ngwa ọzọ site na disk ma tụfuo ndezi a na-echekwabeghị.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.ad: Tinye node ọhụrụ nke ụdị ahọpụtara.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.se: Tọọ node ahọpụtara ka ọ bụrụ mmepụta ngwa.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.sa: Chekwaa graph ngwa dị ugbu a na disk.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.co: Detuo JSON ngwa ahọpụtara gaa na clipboard.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.te: Kpọọ nnwale dị mkpirikpi site na iji graph ngwa dị ugbu a.
